question_text:
In commit a0f7cba on 2026-07-07, you wrote line 15 of gradebook/analytics.py:
15:     elif score >= 80:

Consider changing `score >= 80` to `score > 80`.

After changing `elif score >= 80` to `elif score > 80`, what observable behavior breaks at the B-grade lower boundary, and why does the next condition determine the returned grade?
